arts.ttl: 'Here's why I really left Real Madrid after Cristiano Ronaldo was blamed for my exit'
arts.sum: Rafael Benitez endured a tough time when he took charge of Real Madrid in 2015, but he has insisted that rumours surrounding his departure are not to be believed

arts.ttl: Al-Nassr target Chelsea's Caicedo - Thursday's gossip
arts.sum: Chelsea midfielder Moises Caicedo is linked with a move to Saudi Arabia, Newcastle's Sandro Tonali is wanted by Juventus, while Arsenal are told how much RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko will cost.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo together in the same team? The dream could become a reality
arts.sum: Carlos Tevez, the famous 'Apache' is the one who could finally bring together the two great emblems of world football, in his farewell match, as he has stated that he wants them both on the pitch for the occasion. Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo have met on the pitch many times, but always on opposing teams, so the mere possibility of them wearing the same jersey has become a long-held desire for soccer fans.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo nears decision on Al Nassr future amid contract talks
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo looks set to extend his career well into his forties, with a new contract at Saudi Pro League club Al Nassr thought to be close.
